response.justification: Over 15 years of professional full-stack experience with TypeScript and Node.js across multiple production roles, strong cloud and containerization exposure (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), a demonstrably deep testing culture including authored testing libraries and TDD advocacy, and current hands-on AI agent infrastructure work with MCP frameworks at re:cinq — all tightly aligned with the role's core requirements. The main gaps are NestJS (not mentioned) and Kotlin (limited evidence).
strengths: TypeScript and Node.js used across multiple production roles at scale (Optilyz, RIDE Capital, re:cinq)
Active AI agent and MCP framework development at current role directly matches the AI agent requirement
Exceptional testing depth: TDD practitioner, authored D-language testing libraries, ran public TDD workshops
concerns: NestJS not mentioned anywhere in the resume
Kotlin/Java exposure appears minimal and dated (Java at Altom 2016–2018)
React listed at Optilyz but Ember.js was the historical frontend of choice — depth in React is unclear
